element.name: Case Worker
element.documentation: Responsible business actor.

element.name: Claims Office
element.documentation: Business actor participating in case coordination.

element.name: Case App
element.documentation: Application component.

element.name: Claims Coordination Collaboration
element.documentation: Application collaboration of components coordinating claim handling.

element.name: Claims Application
element.documentation: Application component that executes claim handling behavior.

element.name: Claims Intake Application
element.documentation: Application component for receiving incoming claims.

element.name: Claims Validation Application
element.documentation: Application component for validating claim details.

element.name: Claim Received
element.documentation: Application event raised when a claim is received.

element.name: Claim Validation Requested
element.documentation: Application event raised when claim validation is requested.

element.name: Handle Case
element.documentation: Application function for handling a case.

element.name: Case Interface
element.documentation: Application interface for exposing the component.

element.name: Coordinate Claim Handling
element.documentation: Application interaction for coordinated claim handling.

element.name: Register Claim
element.documentation: Application process for registering incoming claims.

element.name: Case API
element.documentation: Application service.

element.name: Claim Coordination Service
element.documentation: Application service for coordinating claim handling.

element.name: Deployment Script
element.documentation: Artifact used to deploy the system.

element.name: Risk Assessment
element.documentation: Assessment of current operational risk.

element.name: Case Coordination Team
element.documentation: Business collaboration coordinating case handling.

element.name: Case Review Requested
element.documentation: Business event raised when case review is requested.

element.name: Handle Requests
element.documentation: Business function for handling requests.

element.name: Case Service Desk
element.documentation: Business interface exposing case support.

element.name: Coordinate Case Handling
element.documentation: Business interaction for coordinated case handling.

element.name: Claim
element.documentation: Business object representing a claim.

element.name: Case File
element.documentation: Business object containing the case file.

element.name: Case File
element.documentation: Business object containing the case file.

element.name: Handle Claim
element.documentation: Business process for handling a customer claim.

element.name: Review Case
element.documentation: Business process for reviewing a case.

element.name: Resolve Case
element.documentation: Business process for resolving a case.

element.name: Request Handling Service
element.documentation: Business service for request handling.

element.name: Case Coordination Service
element.documentation: Business service for coordinating case handling.

element.name: Case Support Service
element.documentation: Business service for case support.

element.name: Internal Network
element.documentation: Communication network connecting the infrastructure.

element.name: Budget Constraint
element.documentation: Constraint limiting infrastructure spending.

element.name: Case Support Agreement
element.documentation: Business contract governing case support.

element.name: Case Record
element.documentation: Data object containing case data.

element.name: Claim Record
element.documentation: Application data object containing the registered claim.

element.name: Validation Record
element.documentation: Data object containing validation information.

element.name: Application Server
element.documentation: Device hosting the application runtime.

element.name: Plant Distribution Network
element.documentation: Network distributing resources to equipment.

element.name: Cost Reduction
element.documentation: Driver for reducing operating costs.

element.name: Production Equipment
element.documentation: Physical equipment used in production.

element.name: Manufacturing Facility
element.documentation: Facility housing the equipment and processes.

element.name: Reduce Operational Cost
element.documentation: Goal to improve cost efficiency.

element.name: Raw Material
element.documentation: Material consumed by the equipment.

element.name: Operational Value Meaning
element.documentation: Meaning that explains the value of sustainable operations.

element.name: Cost Efficiency Principle
element.documentation: Principle to reduce costs where possible.

element.name: Handle Application
element.documentation: Business process for handling an application.

element.name: Case Support Offering
element.documentation: Product offering for coordinated case support.

element.name: Case Summary Document
element.documentation: Representation of case information for staff.

element.name: Lower Infrastructure Spend
element.documentation: Requirement for reduced infrastructure expense.

element.name: Case Handler
element.documentation: Business role for handling cases.

element.name: Case Coordinator
element.documentation: Business role responsible for coordinating case work.

element.name: Case Service Coordinator
element.documentation: Business role coordinating case services.

element.name: Service Staff
element.documentation: General business role for service staff.

element.name: Executive Sponsor
element.documentation: Stakeholder advocating the initiative.

element.name: Middleware Platform
element.documentation: System software platform supporting application services.

element.name: Infrastructure Collaboration
element.documentation: Technology collaboration linking infrastructure elements.

element.name: System Startup
element.documentation: Technology event representing system startup.

element.name: Platform Management
element.documentation: Technology function for managing the platform.

element.name: Technology Interface
element.documentation: Technology interface for the deployment environment.

element.name: Node Interaction
element.documentation: Technology interaction between infrastructure components.

element.name: Data Center Node
element.documentation: Technology node representing the physical infrastructure.

element.name: Deployment Process
element.documentation: Technology process executing deployment.

element.name: Hosting Service
element.documentation: Technology service offered by the infrastructure.

element.name: Sustainable Operations
element.documentation: Value representing sustainable business operations.

relationship.name: performs
relationship.documentation: Application component is assigned to the application process.

relationship.name: uses
relationship.documentation: Application process accesses claim record data.

relationship.name: participates in
relationship.documentation: Application component is aggregated into application collaboration.

relationship.name: participates in
relationship.documentation: Application component is aggregated into application collaboration.

relationship.name: performs
relationship.documentation: Application collaboration is assigned to application interaction.

relationship.name: performs
relationship.documentation: Business collaboration is assigned to business interaction.

relationship.name: contains
relationship.documentation: Business role is composed of business interface.

relationship.name: assigns
relationship.documentation: Business interface assigns the business service.

relationship.name: is governed by
relationship.documentation: Business service is associated with business contract.

relationship.name: flows to
relationship.documentation: Business process flows into following business process.

relationship.name: influences
relationship.documentation: Business process influences following business process.

relationship.name: specializes
relationship.documentation: Business role specializes more general business role.

relationship.name: realizes
relationship.documentation: Device realizes the underlying technology service.

relationship.name: contains
relationship.documentation: Communication network aggregates the technology interface.

relationship.name: is interested in
relationship.documentation: Stakeholder is associated with the business goal.

relationship.name: contains
relationship.documentation: Application component is composed of application interface.

relationship.name: is responsible for
relationship.documentation: Business role is assigned to business function.
